ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., PM2.5, SO2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant's impact on health */,
  "threshold_level" REAL /* Recommended safe level of the pollutant */,
  "source_types" TEXT /* Common sources of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the health outcome (e.g., Acute Bronchitis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health outcome */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Scale indicating the severity of the health outcome */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Additional risk factors that exacerbate the health outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "run" TEXT /* Type of analysis run conducted */,
  "source_index" INTEGER /* Index of the source data */,
  "base_pm" REAL /* Base PM concentration measured */,
  "control_pm" REAL /* Control PM concentration for comparison */,
  "delta_pm" REAL /* Change in PM concentration */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when data was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the measurement */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant type */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the measurement location */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("county_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated air quality record */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated health outcome */,
  "cases_reported" INTEGER /* Number of reported cases related to the health outcome */,
  "admissions" INTEGER /* Number of hospital admissions due to the health outcome */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when this health data was reported */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Demographic group affected */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the affected population */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the affected population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES health_outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., security, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the system */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
